scripts.dev: concurrently -c cyan,green "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:api"
scripts.build: npm run build:web && npm run build:api
scripts.check: npm run build:web && cd apps/api && go test ./...
scripts.db:migrate: docker compose exec -T db psql -U aidemons -d aidemons < apps/api/migrations/001_initial_schema.sql
